calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-16-2021 Off Calendar

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-24-2021 Continued To Jul-22-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DONALD SHERRILL, Esq. of Hunt and Henriques (Tel: 408-677-5822) for plaintiff;
Defendant FRANK BUMBALO (415-531-2669) in pro per.

PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Matter discussed.

The Court continues the matter for further hearing to July 22, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

The Court will issue an order today defering ruling on the claim of exemption, and ordering that in the interim the Sheriff's Office cease to garnish the judgment debtor's wages.

Order signed (with copies mailed to parties and to the Sheriff's Office).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Continued To Jun-24-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Continued To Jun-21-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Donald Sherrill (408-677-5822; Dsherrill@HuntHenriques.com) of Hunt and Henriques for Plaintiff.
Frank Bumbalo (415-531-2669; frankboom415@yahoo.com) Defendant in propria persona.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to June 21, 2021.

Mr. Sherrill stated he will call the sheriff's office today to request halt on any further wage garnishments from Mr. Bumbalo's paychecks.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
